title: glochidion grossum
intro: Glochidion grossum, also known as the Borneo globe-wood, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Borneo. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Glochidion grossum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are taken to harness its medicinal properties.
